profiles.label: Recent Graduate
profiles.resume:
Alex Chen
Computer Science, State University, May 2024

Skills: Python, Java, SQL, Git. Completed coursework in data structures, algorithms, and databases. Capstone project: built a REST API for a campus event scheduler using FastAPI and PostgreSQL. Internship at a local startup: wrote ETL scripts and unit tests. Familiar with Linux and basic Docker.

Education: B.S. Computer Science, GPA 3.6. Relevant courses: Software Engineering, Database Systems, Web Development.
profiles.githubSummary: Pinned: campus-event-api (FastAPI, PostgreSQL), algo-practice (Python). Contributed to one open-source docs fix. Mostly academic and personal projects.

profiles.label: Career Switcher
profiles.resume:
Jordan Lee
Transitioning from Data Analyst to Software Engineering

Current role: Data Analyst at FinCorp (2 years). Daily use: Python (pandas, numpy), SQL, Excel, Tableau. Built dashboards and automated reports. Some scripting for data pipelines. Self-studying: JavaScript, React, HTML/CSS via freeCodeCamp and Udemy. Side project: small React todo app and a static portfolio site.

Previous: Biology degree, lab work. Strong problem-solving and communication. Looking for frontend or full-stack roles.
profiles.githubSummary: Repos: react-todo-app, portfolio-2024, sql-snippets, python-scripts. Learning in public; recent focus on React and TypeScript.

profiles.label: Mentee Example
profiles.resume:
Sam Rivera
First-year CS student, Community College. Expected transfer to four-year program in 2025.

Completed: Intro to Programming (Python), Intro to Web (HTML/CSS/JS). Currently taking: Data Structures. Personal projects: calculator app in JS, simple CLI quiz in Python. Interested in cloud and backend roles. No professional experience yet. Active in CS club and hackathons.

Goals: land an internship in the next 12 months, build portfolio with 2–3 solid projects.
